description.en: Playable heroes, NPCs, skins, expression sheets, turnarounds, and production-ready character references.
description.zh: 主角、NPC、皮肤、表情表、三视图与可交付角色设定。

description.en: Biome concepts, level mood paintings, hub areas, dungeons, cities, and combat arenas.
description.zh: 生态区、关卡氛围图、主城、地下城、城市与战斗场。

description.en: Weapons, armor, consumables, loot, relics, crafting items, and inventory-ready prop designs.
description.zh: 武器、防具、消耗品、掉落物、遗物、制造材料与背包道具。

description.en: HUDs, menus, inventory screens, character panels, skill trees, battle overlays, and mobile game interfaces.
description.zh: HUD、菜单、背包、角色面板、技能树、战斗界面与手游 UI。

description.en: Skill icons, item icons, app icons, achievement badges, status effects, and resource currencies.
description.zh: 技能图标、物品图标、App 图标、成就徽章、状态效果与资源货币。

description.en: Magic spells, elemental attacks, impact frames, hit effects, aura loops, and VFX concept sheets.
description.zh: 法术、元素攻击、打击帧、受击反馈、光环循环与特效设定表。

description.en: World maps, tactical maps, isometric tiles, resource nodes, route boards, and readable minimap concepts.
description.zh: 世界地图、战术地图、等距地块、资源点、路线板与小地图概念。

description.en: Hero cards, gacha splash art, collectible illustrations, frame variants, and rarity-driven visuals.
description.zh: 英雄卡、抽卡立绘、收藏插画、卡框变体与稀有度视觉。

description.en: Enemies, bosses, creatures, mutation variants, readable silhouettes, weak points, and attack cues.
description.zh: 敌人、Boss、生物、变体、清晰剪影、弱点与攻击预兆。

description.en: Base buildings, town sets, shops, resource facilities, destructible props, and modular settlement kits.
description.zh: 基地建筑、城镇套件、商店、资源设施、可破坏物与模块化据点。

title.zh: 游戏主视觉与商店素材

description.en: Steam capsules, app store screenshots, launch posters, event banners, seasonal campaigns, and social ads.
description.zh: Steam 胶囊图、商店截图、上线海报、活动 Banner、赛季 Campaign 与社媒广告。

description.en: 2D sprites, pixel characters, idle/run/attack sheets, hit reactions, and clean frame grids.
description.zh: 2D 精灵、像素角色、待机/奔跑/攻击帧、受击动作与整齐帧表。

description.en: Production-ready hero, NPC, and skin reference sheets with identity anchors, palette, poses, and details.
description.zh: 面向主角、NPC 和皮肤的可生产角色设定表，包含身份锚点、配色、姿态和细节。

useWhen.en: Use for playable characters, NPCs, skins, avatar variants, and any prompt that needs consistent character design.
useWhen.zh: 用于可玩角色、NPC、皮肤、头像变体，以及任何需要角色一致性的设定任务。

en: Lock role, faction, silhouette, costume materials, face anchors, palette, and game genre before style words.
Ask for front view plus 2-4 detail callouts; use turnaround only when the user needs production reference.
zh: 先锁定职业、阵营、剪影、服装材质、脸部识别点、配色和游戏类型，再写风格词。
默认生成主视图加 2-4 个细节放大；只有需要生产参考时才要求三视图。

en: Avoid changing age, face, costume, or faction across panels.
Avoid busy backgrounds unless the request is splash art rather than a reference sheet.
zh: 避免不同面板换年龄、换脸、换衣服或换阵营。
设定表不要复杂背景；如果用户要的是立绘或宣传图，再加入场景。

description.en: Level, biome, hub, dungeon, and arena mood concepts with gameplay-readable paths and focal points.
description.zh: 面向关卡、生态区、主城、地下城和战斗场的氛围概念图，强调可读路线和视觉焦点。

useWhen.en: Use for locations, level mood paintings, playable spaces, dungeons, towns, arenas, and environmental storytelling.
useWhen.zh: 用于地点、关卡氛围图、可游玩空间、地下城、城镇、竞技场和环境叙事。

en: Define camera height, player path, landmark, interactable zones, mood, time of day, and scale cues.
Separate visual mood from gameplay readability: clear entrances, cover points, routes, and reward focal points.
zh: 明确镜头高度、玩家路线、地标、可交互区域、情绪、时间和尺度参照。
把氛围和玩法可读性同时写清：入口、掩体、路线和奖励焦点要能看出来。

en: Avoid pure wallpaper scenery with no gameplay function.
Avoid overusing fog, bloom, and darkness until important gameplay shapes disappear.
zh: 避免只像风景壁纸，看不出游戏功能。
避免雾、泛光和暗部过重，导致关键玩法形状消失。

description.en: Weapons, armor, relics, loot, consumables, and crafting items with readable silhouette and material logic.
description.zh: 武器、防具、遗物、掉落物、消耗品和制造材料，强调剪影可读性和材质逻辑。

useWhen.en: Use for inventory items, weapon concepts, equipment sets, crafting resources, and prop callout sheets.
useWhen.zh: 用于背包物品、武器概念、装备套装、制造资源和道具细节拆解。

en: Lock item class, rarity, gameplay function, scale, materials, damage/wear state, and silhouette language.
Ask for one hero item plus 3-6 orthographic callouts or a clean grid of variants.
zh: 锁定道具类别、稀有度、玩法功能、尺度、材质、损耗状态和剪影语言。
默认一件主道具加 3-6 个正交细节；变体需求则使用整齐网格。

en: Avoid unclear scale and impossible handles, blades, straps, or attachment points.
Avoid unreadable tiny text on props; use labels outside the object when needed.
zh: 避免比例不清、手柄/刀刃/绑带/接口不可用。
避免在道具上塞小字；需要说明时用外部标注。

title.zh: 游戏 UI 与 HUD 画面

description.en: HUD, inventory, character panel, battle overlay, skill tree, gacha, shop, and live ops event screens.
description.zh: HUD、背包、角色面板、战斗覆盖层、技能树、抽卡、商店和活动运营界面。

useWhen.en: Use for any game interface, especially when layout, readable labels, icon slots, and mobile screen constraints matter.
useWhen.zh: 用于任何游戏界面，尤其是布局、可读标签、图标槽位和移动端比例很重要时。

en: Specify platform, orientation, screen state, core panels, icon counts, text language, and touch-safe spacing.
Use exact UI labels only for short headers; avoid asking the image model to typeset long paragraphs.
zh: 指定平台、横竖屏、界面状态、核心面板、图标数量、文字语言和触控安全间距。
只锁定短标题和按钮文案；不要让图片模型排长段正文。

en: Avoid mixing console, PC, and mobile interface conventions in one screen.
Avoid letting UI cover the character face, enemy silhouette, or combat feedback.
zh: 避免同一张图混用主机、PC 和手游界面习惯。
避免 UI 遮住角色脸、敌人剪影或战斗反馈。

description.en: Skill, item, currency, status, achievement, and app icons with consistent shape language and backgrounds.
description.zh: 技能、物品、货币、状态、成就和 App 图标，统一形状语言和底板。

useWhen.en: Use when the output needs small-size readability, consistent icon families, transparent backgrounds, or square tiles.
useWhen.zh: 用于需要小尺寸可读、图标族统一、透明背景或方形底板的任务。

en: Define icon count, canvas shape, background rule, rarity border, lighting direction, and dominant silhouette for each icon.
For production icons, request centered objects, clean edges, strong contrast, and no embedded text.
zh: 定义图标数量、画布形状、背景规则、稀有度边框、光源方向和每个图标的主剪影。
生产用图标要求主体居中、边缘干净、强对比、不要内嵌文字。

en: Avoid decorative detail that disappears at 64 px.
Avoid different camera angles and light directions within one icon pack.
zh: 避免 64 像素下看不清的装饰细节。
同一套图标不要混用不同机位和光源方向。

description.en: Spell, hit, aura, projectile, explosion, and elemental VFX concepts with phase breakdowns.
description.zh: 法术、打击、光环、飞行物、爆炸和元素特效的阶段拆解。

useWhen.en: Use for skill effects, combat feedback, elemental spell visuals, ultimate abilities, and VFX phase boards.
useWhen.zh: 用于技能特效、战斗反馈、元素法术、大招和特效阶段板。

en: Define gameplay purpose, element, shape language, timing phases, impact point, color temperature, and readability over backgrounds.
Use 4-6 phase frames: anticipation, cast, travel, impact, aftermath, loop if needed.
zh: 定义玩法目的、元素、形状语言、时间阶段、打击点、色温和在背景上的可读性。
使用 4-6 个阶段帧：预备、施放、飞行、命中、残留，需要循环时补 loop。

en: Avoid pure bright bloom with no readable shape.
Avoid VFX that hides the attacker, target, or hit direction.
zh: 避免只有强泛光、没有可读形状。
避免特效遮住施法者、目标或打击方向。

description.en: Readable world maps, minimaps, isometric tiles, route maps, node maps, and modular terrain kits.
description.zh: 可读世界地图、小地图、等距地块、路线图、节点图和模块化地形套件。

useWhen.en: Use for world maps, town maps, tactical boards, tilemap concepts, resource nodes, and route planning visuals.
useWhen.zh: 用于世界地图、城镇地图、战术棋盘、Tilemap 概念、资源点和路线规划视觉。

en: Define projection, grid size, biome rules, landmarks, route hierarchy, interactable markers, and legend style.
For tile assets, request separated tiles with consistent perspective, edge compatibility, and no cast shadows crossing tile borders.
zh: 定义投影方式、网格尺寸、生态规则、地标、路线层级、交互标记和图例风格。
地块资产要分离展示、透视一致、边缘可拼接，不要让投影跨越地块边界。

en: Avoid decorative maps with unreadable routes or inconsistent scale.
Avoid mixing top-down, isometric, and perspective camera angles in one tile set.
zh: 避免只有装饰性、路线不可读或比例混乱的地图。
同一套地块不要混用俯视、等距和透视视角。

description.en: Hero cards, collectible illustration, rarity frames, gacha splash art, and event character banners.
description.zh: 英雄卡、收藏插画、稀有度卡框、抽卡立绘和活动角色 Banner。

useWhen.en: Use for character splash art, collectible card frames, gacha banners, hero portraits, and rarity variants.
useWhen.zh: 用于角色立绘、收藏卡框、抽卡 Banner、英雄头像和稀有度变体。

en: Define rarity, pose, power fantasy, frame shape, title area, background energy, and crop safety.
Keep card text short; use frame and icon slots rather than long paragraphs.
zh: 定义稀有度、姿态、爽感、卡框形状、标题区、背景能量和裁切安全区。
卡面文字要短；用卡框和图标槽表达信息，不要塞长段文字。

en: Avoid frame decorations that hide the character silhouette.
Avoid copying known card game layouts, logos, or exact UI frames.
zh: 避免卡框装饰遮住角色剪影。
避免照搬知名卡牌游戏版式、Logo 或精确 UI 框。

title.zh: 怪物与 Boss 设定表

description.en: Enemy, creature, elite, and boss designs with combat readability, weak points, and attack cues.
description.zh: 敌人、生物、精英怪和 Boss 设计，强调战斗可读性、弱点与攻击预兆。

useWhen.en: Use for enemies, bosses, mutation variants, creature families, attack silhouettes, and combat design sheets.
useWhen.zh: 用于敌人、Boss、变异体、生物族群、攻击剪影和战斗设计表。

en: Define size class, threat role, silhouette, locomotion, weak points, attack tells, materials, and biome origin.
Use 3-5 variants only when they share a clear family shape language.
zh: 定义体型等级、威胁职责、剪影、移动方式、弱点、攻击前摇、材质和生态来源。
只有共享明确族群形状语言时，才生成 3-5 个变体。

en: Avoid adding too many horns, limbs, and eyes without a combat reason.
Avoid silhouettes that look impressive but cannot be recognized at gameplay camera distance.
zh: 避免没有战斗理由地堆角、肢体和眼睛。
避免设定图很酷，但在游戏镜头距离下认不出的剪影。

description.en: Base buildings, shops, upgrade tiers, settlement kits, destructible props, and readable structure families.
description.zh: 基地建筑、商店、升级阶段、据点套件、可破坏物和可读建筑族群。

useWhen.en: Use for modular buildings, city sets, base upgrades, resource structures, shop facades, and destructible environment props.
useWhen.zh: 用于模块化建筑、城镇套件、基地升级、资源建筑、商店外观和可破坏环境物。

en: Define function, faction, upgrade tier, footprint, roof language, material palette, and gameplay readability.
For strategy games, show front/side or isometric views with consistent footprint and clear entrance markers.
zh: 定义功能、阵营、升级等级、占地、屋顶语言、材质配色和玩法可读性。
策略游戏建筑使用前侧视或等距视角，保持占地一致并标出入口。

en: Avoid buildings that look beautiful but do not communicate function.
Avoid inconsistent scale between doors, windows, props, and characters.
zh: 避免建筑好看但看不出功能。
避免门窗、道具和角色之间比例不一致。

title.zh: 游戏主视觉与商店素材

description.en: Steam capsules, app store screenshots, launch posters, seasonal banners, and social ads with safe crop zones.
description.zh: Steam 胶囊图、App 商店截图、上线海报、赛季 Banner 和社媒广告，含安全裁切区。

useWhen.en: Use when the output is for player acquisition, store pages, launch campaigns, live events, or game announcements.
useWhen.zh: 用于拉新、商店页、上线 Campaign、活动运营或游戏宣发。

en: Define asset format, title-safe area, hero characters, gameplay promise, background world, logo placement, and crop variants.
Ask for no final logo text unless exact title rendering is required; leave clean negative space for later design.
zh: 定义素材格式、标题安全区、主角、玩法承诺、世界背景、Logo 位置和裁切变体。
除非明确要生成标题文字，否则保留干净留白给后期设计。

en: Avoid poster compositions that cannot crop into capsule, banner, and square formats.
Avoid misleading gameplay promises in marketing art.
zh: 避免无法裁成胶囊图、Banner 和方图的海报构图。
避免宣发图表达与真实玩法不一致。

description.en: 2D sprites, pixel sheets, idle/run/attack frames, hit reactions, and clean grids for animation reference.
description.zh: 2D 精灵、像素帧表、待机/奔跑/攻击、受击动作和动画参考网格。

useWhen.en: Use for sprite sheets, animation references, side-view characters, top-down units, idle/run/attack loops, and pixel art assets.
useWhen.zh: 用于精灵图、动作参考、横版角色、俯视单位、待机/奔跑/攻击循环和像素资产。

en: Define camera angle, frame count, grid dimensions, animation sequence, silhouette consistency, and transparent background.
For pixel art, specify tile size, pixel density, outline rule, palette limit, and no anti-aliased painterly edges.
zh: 定义镜头角度、帧数、网格尺寸、动作顺序、剪影一致性和透明背景。
像素风要指定 tile 尺寸、像素密度、描边规则、色板限制，并避免绘画式抗锯齿边缘。

en: Avoid changing the character costume or proportions between frames.
Avoid uneven frame boxes that make animation extraction painful.
zh: 避免不同帧换服装或比例。
避免帧框大小不一，导致后续切图痛苦。
